title: Flo's OPM | One Punch Man Mod
description: Characters and abilities from One Punch Man, including powerful combat modes and devastating punches.
body:
# Flo’s OPM – One Punch Man Mod

**This mod adds playable characters, amours, biomes and foods.**

## Features:
### Playable Characters:
- Saitama: Use series and attacks to be like Saitama and destroy opponents.
- Boros: Become boros with items added like restraining armour and different forms and abilities.
- Garou: Countless different forms to obtain all giving different stats and abilities.
- Black S: 3 different forms, keep splitting almost infinitely.
- Zombie Man: Regenerate infinitely, immortal.
- Metal Bat: The lower the health, the stronger and tougher.
- Empty Void: Teleport in and out of dimensions, cutting through the world.
- Homeless Emperor: Infinite energy blasts, at the cost of a weak body.
### Upcoming Characters:
- Blast
- Flashy Flash
- Genos
- Speed o' Sound Sonic
- Tatsumaki
- Atomic Samurai

### Player Experience:
With this mod, you’ll feel like you're in the One Punch Man world. Attack with tons of explosions layered on top of each other, abilities and effects that actually look and feel impactful.

_This mod is currently NOT survival ready, but will be in the near future._

### Obtaining:
Use the item given on first spawn, and choose the desired character.

/give @s flos_opm:wip_selection_item" to obtain with commands.

/advancement grant @s until flos_opm:awakened_garou_cosmic_fear_mode" to fully obtain Garou.

### Key Binds:
B - Enter combat mode

R - Switch modes

C - Ability (for certain characters)

Right click during combat mode - Special ability

_Work in Progress: More features and abilities will be added in future updates!_
